sorting_note: Keep dry and separate from food contamination
Separate PET and hard plastic when possible
Rinse and sort by color only if local system asks for it
Aluminium and steel are high-value recovery streams
Best diverted to composting or anaerobic treatment
Reusable textiles should be separated before disposal
Treated wood should not be mixed with clean wood
Requires dedicated collection due to hazardous components
Residual stream with low recovery value
